title: 8 Herbal Teas For Premenstrual Syndrome
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains gingerols and shogaols, active constituents that help alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that reduce pain and inflammation in the body. Shogaols, in particular, have been shown to inhibit prostaglandins, hormone-like substances that cause cramping and discomfort during PMS. The anti-nausea properties of gingerols also help reduce dizziness and lightheadedness often associated w...
